name: cisco-network-ops-skill
description: Diagnose-first Cisco network operations guidance for change safety, troubleshooting, and automation review.

interface.shortDescription: Cisco change, incident, and automation guidance
interface.longDescription: Diagnose-first guidance for Cisco network operations work across IOS XE, NX-OS, IOS XR, and adjacent Cisco platforms. Reviews changes, troubleshooting artifacts, and automation for evidence, risk, validation, and rollback.
defaultPrompt: Review this Cisco change for risk and rollback.
Review this NetOps automation for safe rollout.
